71 
CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT 
LABEL: 
Capitated Payment Billed Date 
DESCRIPTION: The date that the managed care entity submitted the capitated payment bill to the state. 
SHORT NAME: CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT 
LONG NAME: CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
OT header 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing =
